recommendations.title: Hunger
recommendations.overview: A talented young street-food cook pushes herself to the limit after accepting an invitation to train under an infamous and ruthless chef.

recommendations.title: The Shack
recommendations.overview: A grieving man receives a mysterious, personal invitation to meet with God at a place called 'The Shack'.

recommendations.title: The Wife
recommendations.overview: A wife questions her life choices as she travels to Stockholm with her husband, where he is slated to receive the Nobel Prize for Literature.

recommendations.title: A Deadly Invitation
recommendations.overview: Eccentric millionaire Olivia sends her half sister Agatha, and a group of old acquaintances, a mysterious invitation for a weekend on her yacht, where they will discover the true motive behind this invitation: the celebration of… a murder?

recommendations.title: The Loved Ones
recommendations.overview: When Brent turns down his classmate Lola's invitation to the prom, she concocts a wildly violent plan for revenge.

recommendations.title: Enter the Dragon
recommendations.overview: A martial artist agrees to spy on a reclusive crime lord using his invitation to a tournament there as cover.

recommendations.title: The Motive
recommendations.overview: Álvaro, a man obsessed with the idea of writing what he brands as “high literature,” manipulates the lives and feelings of the people around him to write about the consequences caused by his devious acts.

recommendations.title: The Jane Austen Book Club
recommendations.overview: Six Californians start a club to discuss the works of Jane Austen. As they delve into Austen's literature, the club members find themselves dealing with life experiences that parallel the themes of the books they are reading.

recommendations.title: Pokémon the Movie: Mewtwo Strikes Back - Evolution
recommendations.overview: After accepting an invitation from a mysterious trainer, Ash, Misty and Brock meet Mewtwo, an artificially created Pokémon who wants to do battle.

recommendations.title: Half Sister, Full Love
recommendations.overview: Mourning his brother's recent death, Pierrick accepts his best friend Tessa's invitation to stay in her family home — at last, a week alone. But when her gets there, he finds the house already occupied by Tessa's sister Marie.
